title: CreateSMP : Reloaded
description: Create based Vanila++ pack intended for multiplayer servers.
body:
This is a custom modpack made for the Create SMP! 
( A small private server intended for me and my friends). 
Most of the pack is server sided to put less strain on the client.
Do you want to play on a vanila esque server with the create mod? Then this is the modpack for you!


<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>

- Create Fabric
- Beneath The Wetlands
- Create : Steam 'n' Rails
- Fabric Seasons
- Fabric Seasons Extra
- Farmer's Delight Refabricated
- Galosphere
- Hardcore Revival
- Distant Horizons
- Simple Voice Chat


</details>


<details>
